results.reason: Frontend manifest validation behavior verified by focused unit test: plugin-registry rejects incomplete manifests with explicit missing-field errors for id/name/version/nodes.
evidence: vitest: bunx vitest run app/lib/flow/__tests__/plugin-registry.test.ts app/lib/flow/__tests__/hook-dispatch.test.ts app/lib/flow/__tests__/plugin-hooks.test.ts -> 3 files passed, 15 tests passed

results.reason: Frontend plugin registry definition loading verified by unit tests covering registerPlugin/getNodeDefinition/listAllNodeDefinitions and metadata attachment.

Unit tests for onNodeCreate pass, but required UI-level assertion screenshot of node-creation hook behavior could not be executed because frontend points to API/WebSocket at 127.0.0.1:8000 (connection refused), preventing creation/loading of an agent flow canvas in UI.
evidence: console: createAgent and websocket calls fail with ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED to 127.0.0.1:8000

results.reason: onConnectionValidate lifecycle dispatch behavior verified by focused frontend unit tests for both global and node-scoped hook dispatch paths.
onSocketTypePropagate dispatch and propagation behavior verified by focused frontend unit tests (including failure isolation path and propagation resolution helper).
Hardcoded frontend node-type literal scan returned zero matches in core flow files per contract grep; additional focused frontend tests for metadata-driven rendering passed.
evidence: scan command exit: rg ... --glob "!*test*" -> RG_EXIT:1 (no matches)
vitest: bunx vitest run app/components/flow/__tests__/node-types.test.ts app/components/flow/__tests__/properties-panel-route-metadata.test.ts -> 2 files passed, 3 tests passed
vitest: bunx vitest run app/components/flow/__tests__/node-rendering.test.ts -> 1 file passed, 2 tests passed

commands.observation: Agents page reachable; New Agent button visible.

commands.command: agent-browser --session frontend-plugin-api-g3 click @e8; fill name/description; click create
commands.observation: Create modal remained open due to API failures; unable to navigate to /agents/edit?id=... for node-creation UI check.
Multiple ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED errors to 127.0.0.1:8000 for fetch and websocket; createAgent failed.

interactiveChecks.action: Open web UI and verify primary navigation
interactiveChecks.observed: UI loaded with Agents/Toolsets/Settings navigation and New Agent CTA at /agents.

interactiveChecks.action: Create namespaced agent resource (utv_pluginapi_g3-agent-flow) to reach flow canvas and perform node-create hook check
interactiveChecks.observed: Create action failed due to backend endpoint configured at 127.0.0.1:8000 being unreachable; modal stayed open and flow canvas remained inaccessible.

frictions: agent-browser transient 'Resource temporarily unavailable (os error 35)' occurred once during fill/wait; resolved by closing and reopening the same session.
Validation task specifies login credentials, but current web-ui surface did not present an authentication screen to apply them.
blockers: Required UI-level onNodeCreate evidence for VAL-API-004 blocked: frontend API/WebSocket target at 127.0.0.1:8000 refused connections, preventing agent creation and access to flow editor node-creation path.
